Auth.//: WorkloadAppId is the AAD app id of THIS workload backend (audience).
Auth.//FabricAppId: Fabric service appId. Override only for sovereign clouds.
Auth.//Authority: OIDC authority for JWKS. Use a per-tenant URL for single-tenant deployments.
Auth.//AllowedTenants: If set, incoming token 'tid' must be in this list.

Items.//Store: Source of truth for item definitions. 'Fabric' = OneLake via Fabric Items REST API (default, production); 'InMemory' = in-process dictionary (local dev only).
Items.//CacheTtlSeconds: Memory cache TTL for fetched definitions. Lifecycle events invalidate the cache immediately.

Jobs.//Store: Job-run telemetry store. 'InMemory' (default, local dev) or 'AzureTable' (durable across instances).
Jobs.//ConnectionString: Storage account connection string. Mutually exclusive with AccountUri.
Jobs.//AccountUri: Storage account Table endpoint (e.g. https://acme.table.core.windows.net). Authenticated via Managed Identity / DefaultAzureCredential.
